love。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+pT0lTm6/F2pW1xO7BdbesXaDER0aHUCEFHDSsCSROy","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/af3ca6d95a284ab1938bf6afced95c4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795054&x-signature=jG8373ZrQze48n92Y%2BDQDawA6js%3D","user_id":"1220871376606202","user_name":"防杠模式已启动"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1220871376606202","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717346698,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601807699478596633","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾+末日+丧尸+男主无cp】

林放死后，穿越到一个再普通不过的世界。
这里高楼大厦林立，小车川流不息。
生活平平淡淡，林放手握第四天灾系统，一时间无从下手。
于是他辛勤打工，倾家荡产承包荒地、建造农村自建房。
农具种子拖拉机、畜棚钓鱼酿酒房。
林放力求一比一还原星露谷物语。
就凭种田佬们朝6晚2的恐怖作息，相信要不了多久，自己就能靠小玩家们发家致富，走上人生巅峰吧。
林放心里美滋滋的。
游戏内测前一天。

世界毁灭了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/11352ecfc58fb8a4324315763e7f679e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"暮星回vk","author_id":"","book_id":"7601807699478596633","book_name":"天灾降临：我靠玩家苟末日","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102880","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1498人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601807869373071897","read_count":"1498","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"126192"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"55","tags":"科幻末世,第四天灾,无女主,求生,末世","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/11352ecfc58fb8a4324315763e7f679e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393070&x-signature=rpa7XHLD%2BtIAgWeEJ15RkuhqSGw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3790713855941652","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035110AD49E15D937ACD0C6F7F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6414,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":82},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_
